description_long: This is a modern city bus with a rectangular, streamlined body painted in a light gray color. The bus features large, tinted rectangular windows along both sides, providing ample visibility for passengers. The front of the bus has a wide windshield with two side mirrors and a pair of small amber lights at the lower corners. The wheels are black with silver hubcaps, and the bus has a flat roof with three raised rectangular panels, likely for ventilation or air conditioning units. The passenger doors are flush with the body and blend into the side paneling, with one main entry door visible near the front. The overall design is utilitarian and functional, suitable for urban public transportation.
description: A light gray, modern city bus with large side windows, a wide front windshield, and flush passenger doors. The design is streamlined and functional for urban transit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide windshield, two side mirrors, and amber lights at the lower corners.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying four large rectangular windows, a main passenger door near the front, and two wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large rear window and no visible lights or doors.
description_view_3: Right side view with five large rectangular windows and two wheels, no visible passenger door.
attribute_window_arrangement: Four large rectangular windows on the left side, five on the right side, all evenly spaced and of similar size, separated by thin vertical pillars.
